# Enhanced Oil Recovery

**Summary**: Techniques used to increase the amount of oil recovered from a reservoir beyond primary and secondary methods.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] investigated IFT dynamics for chemical EOR applications.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] ['IFT reduction, mobility control, wettability alteration']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] ['spinning drop, microfluidic, MRI, reservoir simulation']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The study evaluated several chemicals (VES, chelating agents) to improve recovery rates. ([[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023, p. 13]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] maintaining stability of chemicals at high temperature and salinity
